raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The San Mateo County Community College District would be granted more flexibility to help students experiencing financial hardship meet the cost of attendance.",
    "The bill introduced by Senator Josh Becker allows the district to waive enrollment fees for students in need.",
    "The Promise Scholars Program assists students with life costs such as food and transportation as well as academic costs including tuition, fees, books, and supplies.",
    "If SB 893 becomes law, the San Mateo County Community College District could make college tuition-free for all 6,000 students eligible for the program.",
    "There are significant educational and socio-economic gaps in San Mateo County despite its overall prosperity.",
    "Participants in the Promise Scholars Program reported improved financial stability and academic focus.",
    "The Promise Scholars Program covers both tuition and books, effectively providing a free education for the first two years.",
    "The passage of SB 893 is expected to increase access to free high-quality education for thousands of residents in San Mateo County."
  ]
}
```
